info.name: Pods
info.summary: Create and manage Kubernetes pods — a root shell with trusted access to your data
info.description: A web interface for creating and managing Kubernetes pods on ScienceData. Each pod gives the user a root shell on an ephemeral system with fast, trusted access to their data, and can be snapshotted into a reusable image. A thin UI over the ScienceData Kubernetes host service (sciencedata_kubernetes); pod manifests are served from a manifest library. Depends on files_sharding and user_group_admin.
info.author: Frederik Orellana, DTU
Ioanna Psylla
